Keep a copy of the original array and a 'current' array. Use a history stack (array of arrays) for undo.
For moveItem: use splice(fromIndex, 1) to remove, then splice(toIndex, 0, item) to insert.
For swap: use destructuring assignment [arr[a], arr[b]] = [arr[b], arr[a]].
Before each operation, push a copy of the current state onto the history stack. Undo just pops from the stack.
